characters.name: Ahmed Al Saeed
characters.description: Ahmed Al SaeedGenderMaleHorseEmirRelationshipsAmy Flemming (shared kiss/ unrequited love)EnemiesTy BordenAdrian GibsonGeorgie Flemmig-MorrisAmy FlemingLou FlemingLikesOnly hearing what he wants to hearDislikesAmy being with TyNot getting what he wantsTaking "no" for an answerFirst AppearancePicking up the PiecesLast AppearanceSecrets and LiesPortrayed ByJade HassounéAhmed Al Saeedis also known as Prince Ahmed who reluctantly allowsAmy Flemingto work with his horseEmir. While at first he doesn't want Amy near his horse, he began to admire her talent with horses. He then began to regularly ask for her help with him falling in love with her He offers Amy a job with him in Europe for four months, something she takes him up on. When she returns to Heartland from Europe, he started to send her gifts, presumably to buy her love. Ahmed follows her home.

characters.name: Archie Morris
characters.description: Archie Morris is Peter Morris' father; husband of Grace Morris. He is Katherine Fleming-Morris and Georgina Crawley-Fleming-Morris' grandfather. Lives in Estevan, Saskatchewan. First appeared inWhat's in a Name(Episode 503) for Katie's Naming Ceremony.

characters.name: Austin Mars
characters.description: Mallory Wells ex-boyfriend. He worked at Maggie's as a waiter. It was apparent that he only dated Mallory because he liked her father's music. Mallory broke up with him because when she told him she was moving to Nashville, he started telling her how great her moving away would be. Mallory broke up with him. Austin rudely asked if it was because he liked Nashville more than Hudson, but Mallory said it was because he liked Nashville more than her. Overall, he was a liar and a snake. AustinGenderMaleAgeAbout 16Hair ColorRedEye ColorBlueRelationshipsMallory WellsEx-GirlfriendLikesMusic, Mallory's dad.Portrayed ByWes Mack (stage name)

characters.name: Bev Bailey
characters.description: Bev BaileyGenderFemaleHair ColorBrownEye ColorBrownFamilyRyan Bailey(Husband)RelationshipsRyan Bailey(Husband)First AppearanceOut of the DarknessLast AppearanceOut of the DarknessPortrayed ByMandie Vredegoor Bev Baileyis the wife ofRyan Bailey. They were married a year and a half prior to this episode, after the barn fire she tries hard to help him through it but he refuses her help. WhenAmycomes by for his help withGallant Princeshe tries to help Ryan talk to Amy and urges him to help with Prince. She's very happy when he eventually goes toHeartland. WhenDanarrives to take Prince back they learn of what really happened and is ecstatic when Ryan is offered the job at the Stud Farm.

characters.name: Bob Granger
characters.description: Bob GrangerGenderMaleOccupation(s)Owner of the Wildlife ReserveFriendsTy BordenAmy FlemingGeorgie Fleming-MorrisLikesHelping animals, Saving animalsDislikesPoachers, People hurting animalsFirst AppearanceSevered TiesPortrayed ByRoger LeBlanc Robert "Bob" Grangeris a kind hearted business man who owns a Rehabilitation Centre for animals. He cares for buffalo, wolves, and more. Bob is first introduced inSevered Tieswhen Georgie wants to visit an animal centre. Georgie had found a website called "Hooves for Hope", but soon found out it was a fake when Amy drove her there. As a result, Ty asked Scott if he knew any place that's legit so Ty can take Georgie. Georgie donates to Bob's shelter after seeing a wolf that's pregnant. Turns out that Bob is involved with some poachers that have been paying him just so he can keep the Rehabilitation centre open. Due to him making this choice, there were two female bears that were killed and harvested.

characters.name: Bryce Quinn
characters.description: Bryce QuinnGenderMaleHair ColorBlackEye ColorBrownHorseBanditOccupation(s)RodeoFriendsCaleb OdellFirst AppearanceNever SurrenderLast AppearanceRoad to NowherePortrayed ByJesse Hutch Bryce Quinnis a friend ofCaleb Odell's from the rodeo who served in Afghanistan. He is first introduced  when he brings his horse to work with Amy with the intention to sell. He was handicapped at some point in time before he showed up to work with Amy.When watching Caleb practice roping with the horse, he grows annoyed at how poorly Caleb was doing. He smiles when the horse began looking for pretzels in his pocket. He is introduced to a woman who also is paralyzed who also rides her horse. This allows him to try to climb back up his horse with help from Caleb and Ty but he doesn't stay on for long. They try again and this time he stays on the horse longer. He ends up changing his mind about selling his horse.(Never Surrender)

characters.name: Callie Philips
characters.description: Callie PhilipsGenderFemaleHair ColorBlondeEye ColorBlueFamilyRay Philips(Father) †RelationshipsTim Fleming(Ex-Boyfriend)DislikesRanchingFirst AppearanceDancing in the DarkPortrayed ByAllison Hossack Callie Philipsis the daughter ofRay Philips, previous owner ofBig River Ranch. She inherits it after his death but isn't in the ranching business so decides to sell. Callie is on theRay PhilipsMemorial Cattle Drive whereJackintroduces her toTim. She's unsure about going through the river and Tim helps her by letting her ride on his horse with him. In the evening, Tim admits that he likes Callie and asks her to dance in the trailer. When they're leaving she gives him her number so they can keep in touch. Tim later reveals to Jack andLisathat he boughtBig River.(Dancing in the Dark)Everyone is surprised when Callie arrives to helpTim. She goes to see him and he tells her that he had 60 head taken, she seems confused that everyone is confused at her being there. Tim suggests Callie stay at theDude Ranchbut whenLoutells them she's not sure it's a good idea, Tim misinterprets it as her giving Callie her room for the night. Callie tells Lou that she's going back toBig Riverwith Tim to help him and asks Lou why they don't like her. She tells her that Tim never told them about her. Callie and Tim argue, she's mad at him for not telling his family about them being together and leaves. Tim calls Callie to apologise and she comes back toHeartlandand her and Tim make up.(True Enough)

characters.name: Callie Philips
